SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:DeviceUpdateDao.kt$DeviceUpdateDao$@Query( """ UPDATE devices SET lastDeviceName = CASE WHEN :name IS NOT NULL THEN :name ELSE lastDeviceName END, lastRssi = :rssi, lastSeenAt = :timestamp, classOfDevice = CASE WHEN :cod IS NOT NULL THEN :cod ELSE classOfDevice END, technology = :technology, vendorName = CASE WHEN :vendor IS NOT NULL THEN :vendor ELSE vendorName END, deviceType = CASE WHEN :deviceType != 'UNKNOWN' THEN :deviceType ELSE deviceType END, encounterCount = encounterCount + 1, advertisingIntervalMs = :interval WHERE fingerprint = :fingerprint """, ) suspend fun updateClassicScanData( fingerprint: String, name: String?, rssi: Int, timestamp: Long, cod: Int?, technology: String, vendor: String?, deviceType: DeviceType, interval: Long? )
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:DevicePersister.kt$DevicePersister.Companion$// Lowered from 32 to 20 to support packets with just Flags + Small MfgData

UnusedPrivateProperty:RfcommConnectionManager.kt$RfcommConnectionManager$val verificationJob = GlobalScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) { try { this@connectSuspending.connect() if (continuation.isActive) continuation.resume(Unit) } catch (t: Throwable) { if (continuation.isActive) continuation.resumeWithException(t) } }
VariableNaming:BleScanHandler.kt$BleScanHandler$private val RETENTION_THRESHOLD_MS = 180_000L // Delete if inactive for 3m
VariableNaming:ScoreDiagnosticLogger.kt$ScoreDiagnosticLogger$// Limit log size to ~10MB to avoid eating storage private val MAX_FILE_SIZE = 10 * 1024 * 1024L
VariableNaming:ScoreDiagnosticLogger.kt$ScoreDiagnosticLogger$private val HEARTBEAT_MS = 30_000L // Log at least every 30s if active
